title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company Digital Technologies family as a Backend Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
